verdict: DEATH (coordinate artefact exposed): frac_B does rise with anisotropy (0.0032->0.5791), BUT the control proves it is a UNITS/COORDINATE artefact, not physics: the magnetic content in the stretched planes (12,13, containing x_1) blows up x6e+04 while the unstretched plane (23) is unchanged (x1.00). This is exactly the embedding scale factor e^{(a-1)Htau} inflating A^{1j} -- rescaling one coordinate axis trivially tilts area bivectors toward it. The implementation (anisotropic EMBEDDING at fixed isotropic causal ORDER) conflates a coordinate stretch with physical anisotropy. A FAITHFUL B4 needs the anisotropy in the CAUSAL ORDER itself (direction-dependent light cones, true Bianchi-I), which breaks the conformal-flat trick and is a larger campaign. As implemented, Direction A does NOT open the magnetic sector; the [FRONTIER] stands.
